description: Search scoping for the agent-context toolchain. Each task family bounds where the agent greps and provides verification shortcuts that prove the pack's claim against source.

cli_work.description: Editing the agent-context CLI (subcommands, tier defaults, routing-block constants, version pin).

verification_shortcuts.check: TIER constants (TIER1/TIER2/TIER3 routing-block templates) are defined here

verifier_work.description: Editing the structural validator (required-files-per-tier, JSON schema, glob existence, template-marker scan).

template_work.description: Editing canonical templates under templates/. Mirror in skills/agent-context/templates/ is regenerated by scripts/sync-from-canonical.sh.

verification_shortcuts.check: templates/ is the canonical source-of-truth (sync script copies FROM here)

experiments_work.description: Editing the Q2 2026 multi-agent rerun harness (extractors, derived metrics, lane runners, schema, judge dispatcher).

verification_shortcuts.check: Schema v3 includes the tool_call_events stream

deck_work.description: Editing the meetup deck source. HTML/PDF/index.html are derived artifacts — re-render together after every edit.

verification_shortcuts.check: Marp YAML frontmatter is on line 1 of the source

ci_work.description: Editing GitHub Actions workflows (CI matrix, release packaging, Pages deploy).

_rules.search_directories: Every directory must exist on disk. Include test directories when the task involves testing.
_rules.exclude_from_search: Exclude generated, derived, and unrelated directories. Do not blanket-exclude tests/ from task families that involve testing.
_rules.verification_shortcuts: The look_for string must actually appear in the referenced file. Verify before finalizing.
